field.name: report_template_start
field.p:
ON THE ONE PART, as LESSOR, the community member identified under the heading of Lessor, hereinafter referred to as the Lessor for the purposes of this contract.
ON THE OTHER PART, as TENANT, the community member identified under the heading of Tenant, hereinafter referred to as the Tenant for the purposes of this contract.
Both parties agree to the LEASE of the cadastral parcels indicated in the section Involved parcels, and in accordance with the agreements and general conditions described in the WHEREAS section.

field.name: report_template_end

ul.li: I. That both parties intervene in their own name and right.

II. That both parties mutually recognize the legal capacity necessary to grant this rural lease of the farms described in the section Involved parcels, which they freely agree to in accordance with the general conditions described below.

field.p:
1st. Legal regime.
This contract is governed by what is expressly agreed by the parties, provided that it does not oppose the Law. In addition, the Civil Code will govern and, failing that, the uses and customs that are applicable.
2nd. Duration.
This contract will last for ........... years.
Once the time has elapsed, the lessee will make possession of the leased properties available to the lessor.
The lessor, in order to recover possession of the property at the end of the contractual term, must reliably notify the lessee one year in advance. Otherwise, if the lessee does not make possession of the leased properties available to the lessor at the end of the term, the contract shall be understood as extended for a period of five years. Such extensions will continue indefinitely until the contract is denounced.
3rd. Development of the contract.
The tenant has the right to determine the type of crop, without prejudice to his obligation to return the property, at the end of the lease, in the state in which it was received and the provisions of the Law on improvements.
4th. Criteria and formal requirements.
This contract may be entered into a public deed at the request of any of the parties, being on the account of the party request the expenses that derive from it.
5th. Rent.
The tenant will pay the lessor an income of............ € per year.
The rent will be updated for each annuity by reference to the annual consumer price index.
The rent will be paid in arrears, within the ............ first days of the month of ......................... , setting as domicile for payment.................................................. ..................................... .......................................
The Lessor agrees to provide the tenant with a receipt for payment.
All amounts to be paid by the Lessor and that by legal provision are chargeable to the Tenan may be demanded by the lessor from the moment they have been paid, stating the concept, amount and provision that authorizes the charge. Failure to pay such amounts will be equivalent to non-payment of rent. The right to pass on will prescribe one year after the payment has been made by the Lessor.
6th. Insurance contract.
The Tenant may insure the normal production of the farm against the normally insurable risks, being able to pass on to the Lessor, from the moment in which he is notified of the arranged insurance, a part of the premium that he saves, in relation to its total amount, the same proportion that exists between the income and the total sum insured.
7th. Expenses and improvements.
The Lessor and the Tenant are obliged to allow the carrying out of the works, repairs and improvements that the other contracting party must or may carry out. Said repairs will be carried out at the time of the year and in the manner that disturbs the least, unless they cannot be deferred.
8th. Assignment and sublease.
The Tenant may not assign or sublease the farm or exploitation without the express consent of the Lessor. This will not be necessary when the assignment or sublease is made in favor of the spouse or one of the lessee's descendants, although the assignment or sublease must be communicated by either party to the lessor within a period of sixty business days from of your celebration. The assignment and sublease will refer to the entire property or exploitation, and will be granted for the entire time remaining in the lease term for a rent that may not exceed the amount agreed between the lessor and the tenant.
9th. Termination, resolution and rescission of the lease.
The lease will end for any of the following reasons:
a) For total loss of the leased thing and for forced expropriation when it is also total. If the loss or expropriation were partial, the lessee may continue with the lease, proportionally reducing the rent. In addition, in case of expropriation, he will be entitled to the compensation that has been set.
b) By expiration of the legal and conventional term and of the extension, if applicable.
c) By mutual agreement of the parties.
d) By unilateral withdrawal of the Tenant, at the end of the agricultural year, having to notify the Lessor one year in advance.
e) Due to the death of the Tenant, the right of their legitimate successors being protected under the terms established in the Law.
f) In leases made in favor of legal persons or community property, from the moment of its extinction.
g) By resolution of the Lessor's right.
In addition, it may be resolved at the request of the Lessor for any of the following reasons:
a) Lack of payment of the rent or the amounts assimilated to it.
b) Seriously breaching the obligation to improve or transform the property, to which the Tenant had committed in the contract.
And for the record, they sign this lease, in duplicate, on the date and place indicated above.

field.name: report_template_start
field.p:
ON THE ONE PART, as SELLER, the community member identified under the heading of Seller, hereinafter referred to as the Seller for the purposes of this contract.
ON THE OTHER PART, as BUYER, the community member identified under the heading of Buyer, referred to hereinafter and for the purposes of this contract as the Buyer.
Both parties agree to the TRADING of the cadastral parcles indicated in the section Involved parcels, and in accordance with the agreements and general conditions described in the WHEREAS section.

field.name: report_template_end

ul.li: I. That both parties intervene in their own name and right.

II. That both parties mutually recognize the legal capacity necessary to grant this rural trading of the farms described in the section Involved parcels, which they freely agree to in accordance with the general conditions described below.
III. That the Seller is the owner of full ownership of the properties described in the Involved parcels section.

field.p: The rustic properties described in the section Involved parcels are being sold for a value of .........€.

1st. Trading.
That the Seller sells to the Buyer the rustic properties described in the section Involved parcels free of charges and leases, along with all elements thereof that they are accessories and inherent to them.
2nd. Price.
The total price of this sale is ......... €.
3rd. Object.
The object of this contract are the rural properties described in the section Involved parcels. Parcels are sold as certain bodies, free of charges and tenants, and up to date with the payment of contributions, taxes and excise duties, in its current, physical and legal state, known by the parties.
In this act, the Seller delivers to the Buyer, who receives it, in perfect conditions of use.
4th. Elevation to public deed and registration in the property registry.
The Buyer, may demand the elevation of this contract to the public to request its registration in the corresponding Property Registry. All expenses, taxes and excise duties, which accrue accordingly, including the Plus-Valía Municipal Excise, if any, must be paid in accordance with current legislation.
5ª. Jurisdiction.
The parties, expressly waiving any jurisdiction that may correspond to them, for questions that may arise or actions brought on the interpretation of compliance or non-compliance with what is agreed herein, expressly submit to the Judges and Courts of {% if record.env.user.city %} {{ record.env.user.city }}. {% else %} Not found.{% endif %}
And for the record, they sign this trading contract, in duplicate, on the date and place indicated above.

field.name: report_template_start
